title: New Ecommerce Tools: May 12, 2026
description:
This week: predictive AI, autonomous marketing, site builders, omnichannel fulfillment, programmatic ads, embedded payments, cross-border commerce, and more.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: May 12, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: New Ecommerce Tools Feature Predictive AI and Autonomous Marketing Solutions
summary_ko: 2026년 5월 12일 주간 이커머스 도구 업데이트에서 예측 AI와 자율 마케팅 솔루션이 주요 트렌드로 부상했습니다. 사이트 빌더, 옴니채널 풀필먼트, 프로그래매틱 광고 등 다양한 영역에서 AI 기술이 적용되고 있습니다. 임베디드 결제와 크로스보더 커머스 도구들도 함께 소개되었습니다.
summary_en: The May 12, 2026 weekly ecommerce tools update highlighted predictive AI and autonomous marketing as key emerging trends. AI technology is being applied across various areas including site builders, omnichannel fulfillment, and programmatic advertising. Embedded payments and cross-border commerce tools were also featured in the update.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 예측 AI와 자율 마케팅 도구를 활용해 고객 경험 개선과 운영 효율성을 동시에 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage predictive AI and autonomous marketing tools to simultaneously improve customer experience and operational efficiency.
key_points: Predictive AI and autonomous marketing are emerging as key ecommerce trends
AI technology integration spans across site building, fulfillment, and advertising
New tools cover embedded payments and cross-border commerce capabilities
one_line_insight_ko: 예측 AI와 자율 마케팅이 이커머스 도구의 새로운 표준으로 자리잡고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Predictive AI and autonomous marketing are becoming the new standard for ecommerce tools.

title: VTEX revenue, GMV grow double digits in Q1
description:
Cloud-based ecommerce platform provider VTEX reported double-digit year-over-year growth in both revenue and gross merchandise volume (GMV) in its fiscal Q1 2026, which ended March 31. Co-founder and co-CEO Geraldo Thomaz Jr. said VTEX has placed an emphasis on growing its artificial intelligence (AI) suite. It has extended its AI product suite across its commerce, […]
The post VTEX revenue, GMV grow double digits in Q1 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: VTEX Reports Double-Digit Growth with AI Suite Expansion in Q1 2026
summary_ko: 클라우드 기반 이커머스 플랫폼 VTEX가 2026년 1분기에 매출과 총 거래액(GMV) 모두에서 두 자리 수 성장을 기록했습니다. 공동창립자 겸 공동CEO 게랄도 토마스 주니어는 인공지능(AI) 제품군 확장에 중점을 두고 있다고 밝혔습니다. VTEX는 커머스 전반에 걸쳐 AI 제품 포트폴리오를 확장하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Cloud-based ecommerce platform VTEX reported double-digit year-over-year growth in both revenue and GMV in Q1 2026. Co-founder and co-CEO Geraldo Thomaz Jr. emphasized the company's focus on expanding its AI product suite. VTEX has been extending its AI capabilities across its commerce platform.
so_what_ko: AI 기능 통합이 이커머스 플랫폼의 성장 동력이 되고 있으며, D2C 브랜드들도 AI 기반 플랫폼 선택을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: AI integration is driving ecommerce platform growth, suggesting D2C brands should consider AI-enabled platforms for competitive advantage.
key_points: VTEX achieved double-digit growth in revenue and GMV in Q1 2026
Company is strategically expanding its AI product suite across commerce operations
AI capabilities are becoming a key differentiator for ecommerce platforms
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기능 확장이 이커머스 플랫폼의 핵심 성장 전략으로 확립되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI capability expansion is becoming the core growth strategy for ecommerce platforms.

title: eBay rejects GameStop’s acquisition offer
description:
Online marketplace eBay has publicly rejected an acquisition offer from GameStop’s CEO that would have seen the retailer attempt to purchase the company. “We have concluded that your proposal is neither credible nor attractive,” said Paul Pressler, eBay’s chairman of its board of directors, in a formal response. Nine days prior, GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen […]
The post eBay rejects GameStop’s acquisition offer appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: eBay Rejects GameStop Acquisition Offer, Calls Proposal 'Neither Credible nor Attractive'
summary_ko: 온라인 마켓플레이스 eBay가 GameStop CEO의 인수 제안을 공개적으로 거절했습니다. eBay 이사회 의장 폴 프레슬러는 '제안이 신뢰할 수도 없고 매력적이지도 않다'고 공식 응답했습니다. 9일 전 GameStop CEO 라이언 코헨이 인수 제안을 했었습니다.
summary_en: Online marketplace eBay has publicly rejected an acquisition offer from GameStop's CEO. eBay's board chairman Paul Pressler stated the proposal was 'neither credible nor attractive' in a formal response. GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen had made the acquisition proposal nine days prior.
so_what_ko: 대형 마켓플레이스들 간의 M&A 움직임이 활발해지고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 플랫폼 의존도 다각화 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Active M&A movements among major marketplaces suggest D2C brands should consider platform diversification strategies to reduce dependency risks.
key_points: eBay formally rejected GameStop's acquisition proposal
Board described the offer as lacking credibility and attractiveness
M&A activity increasing among major marketplace players
one_line_insight_ko: 마켓플레이스 생태계의 통합 시도가 가속화되고 있으나 성공 가능성은 불확실합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Marketplace ecosystem consolidation attempts are accelerating, though success remains uncertain.

title: Amazon launches Amazon Now in U.S. for 30-minute delivery
description:
Amazon announced on May 12 that millions of its U.S. customers can order products for delivery in 30 minutes or less through Amazon Now. The company will rely on micro-fulfillment centers to enable faster delivery speeds. In October 2025, it announced delivery in timeframes as short as 15 minutes in the United Arab Emirates using […]
The post Amazon launches Amazon Now in U.S. for 30-minute delivery appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Amazon Launches 30-Minute Delivery Service 'Amazon Now' Across U.S. Markets
summary_ko: 아마존이 5월 12일 미국 고객들을 대상으로 30분 이내 배송 서비스 'Amazon Now'를 출시한다고 발표했습니다. 회사는 더 빠른 배송 속도를 위해 마이크로 풀필먼트 센터를 활용할 예정입니다. 2025년 10월에는 아랍에미리트에서 15분 배송 서비스를 선보인 바 있습니다.
summary_en: Amazon announced on May 12 that it's launching 'Amazon Now' for 30-minute delivery to millions of U.S. customers. The company will utilize micro-fulfillment centers to enable faster delivery speeds. In October 2025, Amazon introduced 15-minute delivery service in the United Arab Emirates.
so_what_ko: 초고속 배송이 새로운 업계 표준으로 자리잡고 있어, D2C 브랜드들도 즉시 배송 역량 구축을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Ultra-fast delivery is becoming the new industry standard, requiring D2C brands to evaluate instant delivery capabilities for competitive positioning.
key_points: Amazon Now offers 30-minute delivery to millions of U.S. customers
Micro-fulfillment centers enable faster delivery infrastructure
Amazon previously launched 15-minute delivery in UAE markets
one_line_insight_ko: 아마존의 30분 배송 서비스는 이커머스 배송 기대치를 새롭게 정의하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Amazon's 30-minute delivery service is redefining ecommerce delivery expectations.

title: OroCommerce partners with Intellias, introduces a new integration with iPaaS.com
description:
The business-to-business (B2B) ecommerce platform OroCommerce announced new collaborations with iPaas.com and Intellias in separate offerings for its manufacturing clients, as well as wholesalers and distributors. The integration and partnership were both detailed through public announcements in May. They cover enterprise resource planning (ERP), customer relationship management (CRM) and other digital commerce operations for OroCommerce […]
The post OroCommerce partners with Intellias, introduces a new integration with iPaaS.com appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: OroCommerce Expands B2B Capabilities with Intellias Partnership and iPaaS.com Integration
summary_ko: B2B 이커머스 플랫폼 OroCommerce가 제조업체와 도소매업체를 위해 iPaas.com 및 Intellias와의 새로운 협력을 발표했습니다. 이번 통합과 파트너십은 5월 공개 발표를 통해 자세히 소개되었습니다. ERP, CRM 및 기타 디지털 커머스 운영을 포괄하는 솔루션을 제공합니다.
summary_en: B2B ecommerce platform OroCommerce announced new collaborations with iPaas.com and Intellias for manufacturing clients, wholesalers, and distributors. The integration and partnership were detailed in May public announcements. The solutions cover ERP, CRM, and other digital commerce operations.
so_what_ko: B2B 이커머스 플랫폼의 통합 솔루션 확장이 가속화되고 있어, B2B D2C 전략에서 플랫폼 통합 역량을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: B2B ecommerce platform integration solutions are accelerating, requiring consideration of platform integration capabilities in B2B D2C strategies.
key_points: OroCommerce partnered with iPaas.com and Intellias for enhanced B2B capabilities
Solutions target manufacturing, wholesale, and distribution sectors
Integration covers ERP, CRM, and digital commerce operations
one_line_insight_ko: B2B 이커머스에서 통합 플랫폼 생태계 구축이 경쟁 우위의 핵심 요소가 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Integrated platform ecosystems are becoming critical competitive advantages in B2B ecommerce.

title: Kraft Heinz’s biggest portfolio campaign to date celebrates America250
description: The CPG giant is uniting several of its top brands to capitalize on cookout season as it ramps up marketing spend to support its turnaround.
title_en: Kraft Heinz launches biggest portfolio campaign celebrating America250
summary_ko: 크래프트 하인즈가 미국 건국 250주년을 기념하는 대규모 포트폴리오 캠페인을 론칭했습니다. 이번 캠페인은 회사 최대 규모로 여러 주요 브랜드를 통합하여 쿠킹 아웃 시즌을 타겟합니다. 회사 턴어라운드 지원을 위해 마케팅 투자를 확대하는 전략의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Kraft Heinz launched its largest portfolio campaign to date celebrating America's 250th anniversary. The campaign unites several top brands to capitalize on cookout season. This represents part of the company's increased marketing spend to support its business turnaround strategy.
so_what_ko: 대규모 브랜드 포트폴리오를 활용한 통합 캠페인은 D2C 브랜드들이 제한된 예산으로 최대 임팩트를 창출하는 전략적 벤치마크를 제공합니다.
so_what_en: The integrated portfolio campaign approach provides a strategic benchmark for D2C brands to maximize impact with limited budgets through unified brand messaging.
key_points: Kraft Heinz's biggest portfolio campaign targeting America250 celebration
Multiple brand integration for cookout season marketing
Increased marketing investment as part of turnaround strategy
one_line_insight_ko: 대규모 브랜드 포트폴리오 통합 캠페인이 제한된 예산으로 최대 마케팅 임팩트를 창출하는 새로운 모델을 제시합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Large-scale portfolio integration campaigns present a new model for maximizing marketing impact with limited budgets.

title: Foot Locker debuts year-round basketball brand platform under new CMO
description: Brett O’Brien, previously chief sports officer at PepsiCo, was appointed by the retailer after it was acquired by Dick’s Sporting Goods in September.
title_en: Foot Locker debuts year-round basketball platform under new CMO leadership
summary_ko: 풋락커가 새로운 CMO 브렛 오브라이언 하에 연중 농구 브랜드 플랫폼을 데뷔했습니다. 오브라이언은 펩시코의 전 최고 스포츠 임원으로 딕스 스포팅굿즈 인수 후 임명되었습니다. 이는 소매업체의 새로운 브랜딩 전략을 나타냅니다.
summary_en: Foot Locker launched a year-round basketball brand platform under new CMO Brett O'Brien. O'Brien, previously PepsiCo's chief sports officer, was appointed after Dick's Sporting Goods acquisition. This represents the retailer's new branding strategy direction.
so_what_ko: 스포츠 전문성을 가진 리더십과 연중 플랫폼 접근법은 D2C 스포츠 브랜드들이 계절성을 극복하고 지속적인 브랜드 참여를 구축하는 전략을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Sports expertise leadership and year-round platform approach suggest strategies for D2C sports brands to overcome seasonality and build continuous brand engagement.
key_points: New CMO Brett O'Brien from PepsiCo leading basketball platform initiative
Year-round brand platform strategy replacing seasonal approach
Post-acquisition rebranding under Dick's Sporting Goods ownership
one_line_insight_ko: 전문 리더십과 연중 플랫폼 전략이 스포츠 소매에서 계절성을 극복하는 핵심 요소로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Expert leadership and year-round platform strategies are emerging as key factors for overcoming seasonality in sports retail.

title: The dangerous gap between AI output and actual understanding
description:
AI makes it easier than ever to produce impressive work. It’s also making it harder to tell who actually understands the strategy behind it.
The post The dangerous gap between AI output and actual understanding appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI output quality masks concerning gaps in strategic understanding
summary_ko: AI가 인상적인 작업물 생성을 더 쉽게 만들고 있지만, 전략적 이해도를 판단하기는 더 어려워지고 있습니다. AI 결과물의 품질과 실제 전략적 이해 사이에 위험한 격차가 존재합니다. 마케터들은 AI 도구 사용 시 근본적인 전략 이해의 중요성을 간과할 위험에 직면해 있습니다.
summary_en: AI makes producing impressive work easier but determining actual strategic understanding more difficult. A dangerous gap exists between AI output quality and genuine strategic comprehension. Marketers face risks of overlooking fundamental strategy understanding when using AI tools.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 도구 도입 시 전략적 사고력과 기본 마케팅 원리 이해를 보장하는 교육 및 평가 체계를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations must build training and assessment frameworks that ensure strategic thinking and fundamental marketing principles understanding when adopting AI tools.
key_points: AI enables impressive output generation but obscures strategic understanding
Growing gap between AI-generated quality and actual comprehension
Risk of overrelying on AI without fundamental strategy knowledge
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도구의 생산성 향상이 마케터의 전략적 사고력 개발을 저해할 수 있는 역설적 위험이 대두되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The productivity gains from AI tools paradoxically risk undermining marketers' strategic thinking development.

title: Last-click attribution rewards the wrong work in an AI-first world
description:
AI is making marketing influence harder to track. Here’s how to avoid misleading attribution data and make better investment decisions.
The post Last-click attribution rewards the wrong work in an AI-first world appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Last-click attribution fails in AI-driven marketing measurement
summary_ko: AI 중심 세상에서 라스트 클릭 어트리뷰션이 잘못된 작업에 보상을 주고 있습니다. AI가 마케팅 영향력 추적을 더 어렵게 만들고 있습니다. 오해를 불러일으키는 어트리뷰션 데이터를 피하고 더 나은 투자 결정을 내리는 방법이 필요합니다.
summary_en: Last-click attribution rewards wrong work in an AI-first world. AI is making marketing influence tracking more challenging. Methods to avoid misleading attribution data and make better investment decisions are needed.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 시대에 적합한 멀티터치 어트리뷰션 모델과 고급 측정 프레임워크로 전환하여 마케팅 ROI를 정확히 측정해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must transition to multi-touch attribution models and advanced measurement frameworks suitable for the AI era to accurately measure marketing ROI.
key_points: Last-click attribution inadequate for AI-driven marketing environments
AI complicates traditional marketing influence tracking methods
Need for advanced attribution models to guide investment decisions
one_line_insight_ko: AI 시대의 복잡한 고객 여정에서는 전통적인 라스트클릭 측정이 마케팅 투자의 잘못된 최적화를 야기합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Traditional last-click measurement causes misoptimization of marketing investments in AI era's complex customer journeys.

title: CMOs are buying AI that their organization isn’t ready for
description:
A new Gartner survey finds most marketing organizations are investing heavily in AI while lacking the processes and infrastructure to scale it successfully.
The post CMOs are buying AI that their organization isn’t ready for appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: CMOs invest in AI without organizational readiness, Gartner finds
summary_ko: 가트너 조사에 따르면 CMO들이 조직이 준비되지 않은 AI에 투자하고 있습니다. 대부분의 마케팅 조직이 AI에 막대한 투자를 하면서도 성공적인 확장을 위한 프로세스와 인프라가 부족합니다. AI 도구 구매와 실제 구현 역량 사이에 심각한 격차가 존재합니다.
summary_en: Gartner survey reveals CMOs are investing in AI their organizations aren't ready for. Most marketing organizations invest heavily in AI while lacking processes and infrastructure for successful scaling. A serious gap exists between AI tool purchasing and actual implementation capabilities.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 도구 구매 전에 데이터 인프라, 프로세스 정립, 인력 교육을 우선적으로 구축하여 AI 투자의 실질적 성과를 확보해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations must prioritize building data infrastructure, processes, and staff training before AI tool purchases to ensure tangible returns on AI investments.
key_points: Gartner finds CMOs buying AI tools without organizational readiness
Gap between heavy AI investment and scaling infrastructure
Most marketing organizations lack processes for successful AI implementation
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도구 구매와 조직 역량 구축 사이의 불일치가 마케팅 AI 투자의 주요 실패 요인으로 부상하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The misalignment between AI tool purchasing and organizational capability building is emerging as a major failure factor in marketing AI investments.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4
title_en: AI Leadership Navigation: Overcoming Enterprise Implementation Roadblocks
summary_ko: 마케팅 AI 쇼에서 AI 도입에 따른 기업 내 정책 마비와 부서별 갈등 문제를 다룬다. IT 보안팀과 법무팀의 저항, 마케팅팀의 성급한 도입 사이의 균형점을 찾는 방법을 제시한다. AI 회의론자 직원들의 마음을 바꾸고 조직 전체에 AI를 확산시키는 전략을 논의한다.
summary_en: The Marketing AI Show addresses enterprise AI policy paralysis and departmental conflicts during implementation. It explores balancing IT security and legal resistance with marketing teams' rapid AI adoption. The podcast discusses strategies to change AI-skeptic employees' minds and scale AI across organizations.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 도입 시 부서간 갈등과 정책 마비를 사전에 예방하는 체계적인 변화 관리 전략이 필요하다.
so_what_en: LG D2C needs systematic change management strategies to prevent departmental conflicts and policy paralysis during AI implementation.
key_points: Leadership wants AI everywhere while IT security struggles to keep pace
Marketing races ahead while legal and finance teams resist changes
Early-career professionals need guidance on AI learning priorities
Companies get stuck scaling AI across different departments
one_line_insight_ko: AI 도입 성공의 핵심은 기술이 아닌 조직 내 변화 관리와 부서간 협력에 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Successful AI adoption depends on organizational change management and cross-departmental collaboration, not just technology.

title: Mail Metro Media shifts ad strategy toward PMPs and fewer ads as it unifies stack
description: Mail Metro Media wants to drive 300% PMP growth over the next three years as part of plans to turn a high-volume digital direct business into an outcomes shop.
title_en: Mail Metro Media Pivots to Premium PMPs and Unified Ad Stack Strategy
summary_ko: 메일 메트로 미디어가 향후 3년간 PMP 성장률 300%를 목표로 광고 전략을 전환한다. 대용량 디지털 직접 광고 사업에서 성과 중심 사업으로 변화를 추진하고 있다. 통합 스택 구축과 함께 더 적은 수의 프리미엄 광고로 전략을 수정한다.
summary_en: Mail Metro Media aims for 300% PMP growth over three years as part of strategic shift. The company is transitioning from high-volume digital direct business to an outcomes-focused approach. They're unifying their ad stack while reducing ad volume in favor of premium placements.
so_what_ko: 프리미엄 PMP와 통합 스택 전략은 LG D2C의 광고 효율성과 브랜드 안전성을 높이는 참고 모델이 될 수 있다.
so_what_en: The premium PMP and unified stack strategy could serve as a reference model for improving LG D2C's advertising efficiency and brand safety.
key_points: Targeting 300% PMP growth over next three years
Shifting from high-volume to outcomes-focused advertising
Unifying ad stack for better integration
Moving toward fewer but premium ad placements
one_line_insight_ko: 대용량 광고에서 성과 중심 프리미엄 전략으로의 전환이 미디어 업계의 새로운 트렌드로 부상하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: The shift from high-volume to outcomes-focused premium advertising is emerging as a new trend in the media industry.

title: Ad tech is lining up behind OpenAI (it’s been here before)
description: OpenAI needs ad tech. Ad tech knows it won’t always.
title_en: Ad Tech Industry Rallies Behind OpenAI Despite Past Experience
summary_ko: 광고 기술 업계가 OpenAI를 지원하기 위해 줄을 서고 있다. 하지만 업계는 이전에도 비슷한 경험을 겪은 바 있어 신중한 접근이 필요하다. OpenAI가 광고 기술을 필요로 하지만 광고 기술 업계도 항상 의존적이지는 않을 것임을 인식하고 있다.
summary_en: The ad tech industry is lining up to support OpenAI's initiatives. However, the industry has experienced similar situations before and approaches with caution. While OpenAI needs ad tech support, the ad tech industry recognizes it won't always be dependent on such partnerships.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 OpenAI와 같은 AI 플랫폼과의 파트너십에서 균형잡힌 관계를 구축하여 기술 의존성을 최소화해야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should build balanced relationships with AI platforms like OpenAI to minimize technological dependency while maximizing partnership benefits.
key_points: Ad tech companies are actively supporting OpenAI
Industry has experienced similar partnerships before
OpenAI currently needs ad tech support
Ad tech recognizes the temporary nature of such dependencies
one_line_insight_ko: AI 플랫폼과 광고 기술 업계의 파트너십은 상호 의존적이지만 일시적인 성격을 가진다.
one_line_insight_en: Partnerships between AI platforms and ad tech are mutually beneficial but inherently temporary in nature.

title: [AINews] The End of Finetuning
description: a quiet day lets us reflect on whither finetuning
title_en: The End of Finetuning: AI Development Paradigm Shift
summary_ko: AI 개발 패러다임에서 파인튜닝의 종료에 대한 성찰을 다룬다. 조용한 날을 통해 파인튜닝의 미래 방향성에 대해 깊이 생각해보는 기회를 제공한다. AI 엔지니어링 분야에서 파인튜닝 기법의 변화와 발전 방향을 논의한다.
summary_en: The article reflects on the end of finetuning in AI development paradigms. It provides an opportunity for deep reflection on the future direction of finetuning during a quiet period. The piece discusses changes and evolution directions in finetuning techniques within AI engineering.
so_what_ko: LG D2C의 AI 모델 개발 전략에서 파인튜닝 대안 기법들을 미리 준비하고 투자할 필요가 있다.
so_what_en: LG D2C needs to prepare and invest in alternative techniques to finetuning for AI model development strategy.
key_points: Finetuning era may be coming to an end
Reflection period allows strategic thinking about AI development
Engineering paradigms in AI are shifting
New approaches to model training are emerging
one_line_insight_ko: AI 모델 학습 방법론의 근본적 변화가 기술 개발 전략의 재검토를 요구하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Fundamental changes in AI model training methodologies are demanding a strategic review of technology development approaches.

title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
description: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.
title_en: Medicare's AI-Ready Payment Model Creates New Healthcare Commerce Opportunities
summary_ko: 메디케어의 새로운 결제 모델이 AI를 위해 설계되었으나 대부분의 기술 업계가 이를 모르고 있다. ACCESS 모델은 환자 모니터링, 전화 확인, 주거 추천 조정 등을 수행하는 AI 에이전트에 대한 최초의 정부 결제 메커니즘을 제공한다. 이는 방문 간 환자 관리 AI 솔루션에 새로운 수익 기회를 열어준다.
summary_en: Medicare's new payment model is designed for AI applications, but most tech companies are unaware of this opportunity. The ACCESS model creates the first governmental payment mechanism for AI agents that monitor patients, make check-in calls, and coordinate care referrals. This opens new revenue opportunities for AI solutions in patient care management between visits.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 헬스케어 분야에서 AI 에이전트 기반 서비스 모델을 개발하여 정부 지원 수익 구조를 활용할 수 있는 기회를 탐색해야 한다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should explore opportunities to develop AI agent-based service models in healthcare that can leverage government-supported revenue structures.
key_points: Medicare's ACCESS model creates first payment mechanism for AI agents
Most tech companies are unaware of this healthcare AI opportunity
AI agents can monitor patients between visits and coordinate care
New revenue streams for AI-powered healthcare services
one_line_insight_ko: 정부 결제 시스템의 AI 지원은 헬스케어 상거래에서 AI 에이전트의 새로운 비즈니스 모델을 가능하게 한다.
one_line_insight_en: Government payment system support for AI enables new business models for AI agents in healthcare commerce.
